description: Composition Purple sweatshirt made of 88% polyester and 12% spandex, has a mock neck with a zippered chest closure, long raglan sleeves, mesh panels at the armholes, brand name printed on the left sleeve and brand swoosh printed on the left chest Fitting Regular Wash care Machine wash inside out with warm water and like colours Do not bleach,dry clean or use softners Tumble dry low Cool iron; Do not iron on decorations Great for your gym sessions or jogging, this great pullover from puma is an absolute must for your casual wardrobe and is a refreshing addition to your winter collection. The soft fabric provides lightweight comfort and warmth, the stylish print gives you a strong sporty edge and the mesh panels with dry-Fit technology keeps you sweat-free all day. Layer over long sleeved tees, jeans or tracks and sports shoes. Model statistics Product is a size M on a model of height 6', chest 39" and shoulders 18"
